title: Spear & Jackson 5253PK Enhanced Telescopic Patio Knife
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Stainless steel blade for rust resistance
Telescopic handle extends up to 60 Inch
Double riveted blade for extra strength
Grow Your Own 2022 Great British Growing Award Winners
description: From the manufacturer Spear & Jackson Spear & Jackson has been selling hand, garden, contractors, agricultural and landscaping tools since 1760. The company was founded in the City of Sheffield, which is famous for the production of steel, cutlery and hand tools and continues to be our home over 250 years later. The Razorsharp Range "Making gardening easier and more enjoyable" Our Razorsharp Garden Cutting range includes our Pro, Advance, Advantage, Steel and Active variants. These encompass a wide range of loppers, secateurs, shears and more to satisfy the needs of both gardening hobbyists and professionals. Our ergonomic designs, combined with quality manufacturing ensure that everyday gardening is easy and enjoyable through the precise and powerful performance our Razorsharp range delivers. Razorsharp PRO is designed to meet the needs of professional gardeners and landscapers, featuring drop-forged carbon steel blades, forged aluminium handles and adjustable blade tensioning Razorsharp ADVANCE incorporates innovative technology like geared and ratchet mechanisms, ergonomic desgisns and new materials - all to make gardening easier and more enjoyable Razorsharp ADVANTAGE features the finest precision cutting range of tools, making it the obvious choice for gardeners who demand expect precise and powerful performance Razorsharp STEEL has been created to meet the most demanding standards - for extra strength and durability each tool features tubular steel handles Razorsharp ACTIVE combines quality with excellent value - ideal for those with a newfound love of gardening Our Extensive Range of Cutting Tools Secateurs & Snips Bypass Secateurs Anvil Secateurs Geared Secateurs Small, Medium & Large Secateurs Compound Secateurs Vintage Secateurs Twist Secateurs Ergo Twist Secateurs Titanium Coated Secateurs Left Handed Secateurs Grass, Hedge & Lawn Shears Wishbone Shears Topiary Shears Mini Shears Lawn Shears Edging Shears Telescopic Shears Single Handed Shears Compact Shears Multi-Shears Loppers & Long Reach Cutters Geared Loppers Bypass Loppers Anvil Loppers Heavy Duty Loppers Ratchet Loppers Telescopic Loppers Mini Loppers Dual Compound Loppers Telescopic Tree Pruners Long Reach Cutters Other Cutting Weed Pullers Easy Reach Pruners Patio Knifes Blade Sharpeners Scissors & Sets Axes & Hatchets Our Promise All Spear & Jackson products undergo rigorous quality inspection and testing. We cover against defects in manufacturing subject to wear and tear and the provision of reasonable care and maintenance. If you do have an issue with one of our products, please contact Amazon.co.uk customer services who will be happy to help.
